subcodes.first_line: O servant of the True One! Thy letter was received, and a brief reply is herein penned. Supplications and entreaties have been offered at the Threshold of the All-Glorious [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق نامه شما رسید مختصر جواب تحریر میگردد بدرگاه احدیت تضرع و زاری شد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab
